import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut k = 0
  while k < n
    let tok = match tokens.get(k)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = __list_int_push(nums, v)
    k = k + 1
  end
  mut found = false
  mut fi = 0
  mut fj = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n and not found
    mut j = i + 1
    while j < n and not found
      let a = match nums.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      let b = match nums.get(j)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if a + b == target
        found = true
        fi = i
        fj = j
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found
    println("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
  Ok(())
end
